findings.title: Liability cap is too low
findings.clause: fees paid by Customer in the three (3) months before the claim
findings.rationale: A three months liability cap is too low for meaningful SaaS risk.

findings.title: Confidentiality and security should be uncapped or super-capped
findings.clause: cap applies to all claims, including confidentiality breaches, data security incidents
findings.rationale: Confidentiality and data security claims should sit outside the general cap or under a meaningful super-cap.

findings.title: Vendor disclaims IP indemnity
findings.clause: disclaims any obligation to defend Customer against third-party claims alleging ... intellectual property rights
findings.rationale: Vendor should defend and indemnify Customer for IP infringement claims arising from the Services.

findings.title: Customer indemnity is one-sided
findings.clause: Customer will indemnify Vendor for all claims arising from Customer's use
findings.rationale: The customer indemnity is broad and one-sided without reciprocal vendor indemnity.
